assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a terminal with cURL.
No prior account, API key, or successful API request exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Perplexity account and API group, fund prepaid API credits with a payment method, generate a key, and complete an Agent API request over HTTPS.

first_success.outcome: POST https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent with a Bearer key returns Agent API output after payment method and prepaid credits are in place.
first_success.observable_signal: The Agent API returns a successful JSON body with completed status and assistant output text (citations and usage may also be present).

route_selection.surface: Perplexity API Quickstart, Agent API via cURL (prepaid credits)
route_selection.rule: Prefer the shortest complete path that reaches an authenticated API response without requiring an SDK when cURL is documented.
route_selection.selected: Perplexity API Quickstart, Agent API via cURL (prepaid credits)

candidates.name: Perplexity API Quickstart, Agent API via cURL (prepaid credits)
candidates.reason: The general API Quickstart places Agent API first and recommends it for new projects over Sonar. The same docs surface documents cURL to https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent with Authorization: Bearer $PERPLEXITY_API_KEY, so an SDK install is

candidates.name: SDK-first quickstart tab
candidates.reason: SDK install is optional when official docs document an equivalent cURL call.

required_path.action: Open the API Quickstart and follow its API Portal path.
required_path.observable_result: The developer can choose an account sign-in method.

required_path.action: Choose email signup and enter the email address.
required_path.observable_result: The email authentication message is received.

required_path.action: Open the secure login link or enter the one-time password to authenticate.
required_path.observable_result: The API Portal can be accessed.

required_path.action: Create the first API group and choose a descriptive group name.
required_path.observable_result: Group Settings, Billing, and API keys are available.

required_path.action: Open Group Settings and complete the organization name, address, and tax details.
required_path.observable_result: The group is configured for billing.

required_path.action: Open Billing, select Add payment method, and enter the requested credit-card information in the Stripe-managed flow.
required_path.observable_result: The Billing page shows the payment method and credit balance.

required_path.action: Select Buy more credits and purchase enough prepaid API credits for the call.
required_path.observable_result: A positive credit balance is shown.

required_path.action: Open API keys and select + Generate API Key.
required_path.observable_result: A new key is visible for copying.

required_path.action: Copy the key immediately and store it securely before leaving the page.

required_path.observable_result: PERPLEXITY_API_KEY is set for the current shell.

required_path.action: POST an Agent API request with cURL to https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent.
required_path.observable_result: The response is completed and contains assistant output text.

required_path.action: Confirm the Agent API JSON includes completed assistant output text.
required_path.observable_result: Assistant output text is present in the successful response.

prerequisites.description: A Perplexity account created with Apple, Google, or email link or one-time password authentication.
Admin permission for API group billing and API key management.
A credit card and prepaid API credits; API keys are blocked when the credit balance is exhausted.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

external_gates.description: Email signup depends on receiving and using a login link or one-time password.
API group setup requires organization name, address, and tax details.
The official API group prerequisites require a credit card for payment setup.
Credits are purchased in advance, and the public docs do not state a minimum purchase amount for this first call.
The generated key is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.

platform_outcomes.description: POST https://api.perplexity.ai/v1/agent with a Bearer key returns Agent API output after payment method and prepaid credits are in place.

excluded.reason: Official docs document an equivalent cURL call.

sources.title: Troubleshooting: Not receiving one-time passcode or sign-in email
I am having issues signing in

uncertainties.question: What minimum credit purchase amount does the live Billing console permit?
uncertainties.impact: The mandatory initial cash outlay cannot be stated, so the cost gate changes a required action and keeps the record at needs-human-judgment.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official docs require prepaid credits and identify Buy more credits but publish no minimum amount.

uncertainties.question: What exact Stripe card fields and verification screens appear?
uncertainties.impact: The atomic screen count inside the required payment step cannot be recorded.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official docs state that Stripe manages the card flow but do not enumerate its current fields or challenges.
